scope: benchmark/docs only; no runtime source modifications

machine.clock_equivalence_note: GB10 reports a fixed default application graphics clock of 2418 MHz; power-cap control is N/A. GPU_CLOCK_MAX=2400 is exported to both engines and the observed application clock is recorded per run.

fucina.build_command: make lib libdg fucina && go test ./... -count=1

vllm_source_audit.note: Source capability audit only; no local image at this exact commit was found.

artifacts.vllm: not selected: no audited Gemma-4 GGUF launch in the pinned image; exact NVFP4 checkpoint is available instead

artifacts.fucina: LOAD FAILED on current source: NVFP4 shape mismatch L5 P1 (packed 983040 vs 7864320, scale 122880 vs 983040)
artifacts.vllm: candidate exact-artifact load via compressed-tensors; no head-to-head run because the fucina side failed first
artifacts.comparability: MISSING: exact-artifact dense cell stopped before performance, as required

artifacts.vllm: unsupported assistant format; matching HF assistant safetensors not present

artifacts.fucina: supported E4B runtime/server bridge but runtime transforms PLE to FP8 and decode weights to NVFP4/FP8 by default
artifacts.comparability: SAME_SOURCE_ARTIFACT / DIFFERENT_RUNTIME_PRECISION; not kernel parity; server cell stopped because fucina E4B batch parity failed
FUCINA_CAPABILITY_ONLY unless a pinned vLLM GGUF path is demonstrated

artifacts.vllm: unsupported assistant format; matching HF assistant absent

planned_launch_commands.vllm_dense_bf16_plain_measured: GPU_CLOCK_MAX=2400 docker run --gpus all --ipc=host --network host -v /opt/spark/models:/opt/spark/models:ro <pinned-image> <dense12b_bf16> --language-model-only --host 127.0.0.1 --port 18081 --served-model-name gemma-4-12B-IT --max-model-len 16384 --max-num-seqs 32 --max-num-batched-tokens 16384 --gpu-memory-utilization 0.90 --enable-prefix-caching --kv-cache-dtype fp8 --attention-backend TRITON_ATTN
planned_launch_commands.vllm_dense_nvfp4_plain: GPU_CLOCK_MAX=2400 docker run --rm --gpus all --ipc=host --network host -v /opt/spark/models:/models:ro vllm/vllm-openai@sha256:9c719f... <dense12b_nvfp4> --language-model-only --host 127.0.0.1 --port 18081 --max-model-len 16384 --max-num-seqs 32 --gpu-memory-utilization 0.90 --enable-prefix-caching --attention-backend TRITON_ATTN --served-model-name gemma-nvfp4

serialization.vllm_lock_behavior: vLLM ignores the lock; phases are manually serialized
serialization.quiescence_rule: Before every start, nvidia-smi must show 0% compute and only Xorg/gnome-shell. Never overlap engines.

pre_measurement_failures.detail: global nkv=1 hd=512 paged-vs-contiguous max error 0.0112 while paged-vs-host was 1.19e-07; sliding and recycled-sliding passed
FUCINA_BATCH_SELFTEST reported seq_add(batch) failed even with FUCINA_PAGED_MAXSEQS=4; make bench also failed its batch and sampling markers
NVFP4 shape mismatch L5 P1 (packed 983040 vs 7864320, scale 122880 vs 983040); server never became ready
2/8 token mismatches on the third divergent sequence; first two sequences matched independent decode
/tmp/e4b_ref.bin and /tmp/e4b_gen_ref.bin are absent and no repository producer script exists

e4b-mtp-load-test/e4b-spec-test/e4b-spec-stream-test omit libdg.a and fail undefined dg_* symbols; unchanged tests manually linked with libdg.a pass load, 160-token lossless spec, and 160-token lossless stream

missing_acquisition.request: google/gemma-4-12B-it-assistant revision 364bd03c9952e5b7da73665ee30c9eccfc408345; model.safetensors 845719296 bytes, LFS SHA-256 3279c173daddd7186e79d652ad94022415736d3a1370625696c898429b06d6df, plus config/tokenizer metadata. It is semantically the same assistant family as local Q8_0 GGUF; because formats differ, any result remains FORMAT/SYSTEM unless an identical format is supported by both engines. Metadata came from the Hugging Face API with blobs=true; no weight download was performed.

google/gemma-4-E4B-it-assistant revision 8d0031ea8c2109e2b1e86bb9368a4539b537f80a; model.safetensors 159138208 bytes, LFS SHA-256 12875062fc25c51e8fa9b62abd2de7ad48b7d63f8559d5d604fbd5a3d6bcff16, plus config/tokenizer metadata. Local assistant is GGUF Q4_0 only. Metadata came from the Hugging Face API with blobs=true; no weight download was performed.
